name: LoopEnd
description: End accumulator loop, write back to feedback buffer

global_accum._role: PERSISTENT feedback accumulator shared by render/loopBegin (reads) and render/loopEnd (writes). Dynamic global surface (scanned from pass outputs; name starts with 'global_'). Created W x H, rgba16f, linear, 4-channel, double-buffered. loopEnd WRITES the processed chain result back into it via the fullscreen 'copy' program (passes[0] 'feedback'); loopBegin reads it on the next iteration / frame. Persists across frames and loop iterations.

feedback._comment: Accumulator-loop bracket END. loopEnd runs TWO passes, both using the shared fullscreen 'copy'/blit program (verbatim: uv = fragCoord / textureDimensions(inputTex); return textureSample(inputTex, uv)). passes[0] 'feedback' copies inputTex into the persistent 'global_accum' surface, writing the processed chain result back and closing the loop that render/loopBegin opens (reference 10). passes[1] 'output' copies the same inputTex to outputTex, passing the result through. Identical program for both; only the runtime-bound output target differs. The DSL sub-chain between loopBegin and loopEnd is EXPANDED by the frontend compiler and ITERATED N times by the runtime (control-flow loop). This shader is NOT the loop body and has NO iteration-index uniform. No uniforms, no MRT (single fragColor per pass). global_accum is double-buffered; loopEnd writes to its 'global_' write buffer.
